=====[[Pokémon World Tournament]]=====
Roxie uses three of these Pokémon in [[Pokémon battle|Single Battles]], four in [[Double Battle|Double]] and [[Rotation Battle]]s and all six in [[Triple Battle]]s. She will always lead with her signature Pokémon, {{p|Scolipede}}.
